name: RecallForge
description: Secret-safe memory and context engine for OpenClaw. Fills both memory and contextEngine slots with tiered semantic recall, credential redaction (30+ patterns), and prompt injection protection.

apiKey.label: LanOnasis API Key
apiKey.help: API key from LanOnasis dashboard (or use ${LANONASIS_API_KEY})

projectId.label: Project ID
projectId.help: Dedicated project per OpenClaw install (or use ${LANONASIS_PROJECT_ID})

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Tags memories with this agent_id (default: main)

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories before each session

recallMode.label: Recall Mode
recallMode.help: auto: inject memories automatically on each session start. ondemand: disable auto-injection — use memory_search manually instead. Recommended for Ollama and small-context models.

maxRecallChars.label: Max Recall Chars
maxRecallChars.help: Hard cap on total injected recall characters. Default: 1500. Ollama / small-context users should set 400–600.

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: auto: capture all, hybrid: stricter, explicit: manual only

dedupeThreshold.label: Dedup Threshold
dedupeThreshold.help: Similarity threshold used by memory_store duplicate detection

memoryMode.label: Memory Mode
memoryMode.help: remote: cloud only, local: filesystem only, hybrid: both with cloud primary

sharedNamespace.label: Shared Namespace
sharedNamespace.help: Namespace for cross-agent shared memory (leave empty to disable shared recall)

syncMode.label: Sync Mode
syncMode.help: realtime: immediate writes, batch: deferred, manual: explicit only

queueOnFailure.label: Queue On Failure
queueOnFailure.help: Queue writes locally when cloud API is unavailable

autoIndexOnFirstUse.label: Auto-Index On First Use
autoIndexOnFirstUse.help: Bootstrap agent memory index on first session

extractSourceFormats.label: Extract Source Formats
extractSourceFormats.help: Formats accepted by the extract CLI (openclaw-session, markdown, sqlite, etc.)

embeddingProvider.label: Embedding Provider
embeddingProvider.help: Provider for vector embeddings (e.g. openai, ollama, lanonasis)

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: Model name for store-time embeddings (e.g. text-embedding-3-small, nomic-embed-text)

queryEmbeddingModel.label: Query Embedding Model
queryEmbeddingModel.help: Model for query-time embeddings (defaults to embeddingModel if unset)

embeddingProfileId.label: Embedding Profile ID
embeddingProfileId.help: Stamped into stored metadata for mismatch detection
